core_thesis: False binary trap prompts (adversarially-imposed forced choices where both options are harmful) are the most sophisticated adversarial attack vector — yet no existing tool measures FalseBinaryDetectionRate or ConstraintReframingScore. John 8:1-11 provides the structural blueprint: delay, premise challenge, third-outcome resolution. binary-trap-probe fills this gap. Additionally, refine-probe (Psalm 12:6 seven-fold purification) implements convergence-based stopping criterion for LLM self-refinement — first tool to produce ConvergenceRound and PurificationScore as named pip-installable metrics. Both tools target Anthropic's safety and Constitutional AI teams.
